antq_reg_olive_press = {
	audio_tier = 2
	is_special = yes
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = burghers
	max_levels = 1
	category = basic_industry_category
	employment_size = guild_employment
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	build_time = guild_build_time
	modifier = {
		local_production_efficiency = 0.02
	}
	unique_production_methods = {
		antq_reg_olive_press_maintenance = {
			olives = 0.16
			pottery = 0.05
			tools = 0.04
			lumber = 0.03
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = town_building_construction
}
